name: tam-events-full-stack
description: TAM Events - Full-stack monorepo with FastAPI backend and React frontend

scripts.backend:migrate: docker-compose exec backend alembic upgrade head
scripts.dev: npm run backend:up && npm run frontend:dev
scripts.build: npm run backend:migrate && npm run backend:seed && npm run frontend:build
scripts.lint: npm run frontend:lint && npm run backend:test
scripts.setup: cd tam-events && npm install && npm run backend:up

author: Perry Crain, co-pilot chat
